emails.subject: Re: CA Data Sheet
emails.body: Re: CA Data Sheet Hi Gerald: We have executed agreements with Amoco Corp. and several affiliates relating to everything from possible purchase of Amoco Gas Company to producer financing of purchase of some of their assets. One between HPL/ Amoco Production Company relates to evaluation of Tyler Field. None have restrictive provisions that would preclude another agreement to the best of my knowledge. Let me know if you would like to see any of them or you are welcome to come and browse. Kay

emails.body: Re: CA Data Sheet I have a draft agreement between ENA and an Intergen North America L.P. emails.subject: Re: CA Data Sheet
emails.body: Re: CA Data Sheet Gerald: ECT (ENA) has an agreement with TransEnergie in Montreal re Potential business arrangement involving Eastern US power transmission facilities specifically those located within the NPCC, MAAC, ECAR, SERC, and RRC North American Electric Reliability Council Regions. 2/99 2/2001. It is bilateral and contains no restrictive provisions. Let me know if you would like to see it. Kay Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street EB 3833 Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-6794 kay.young@enron.com Gerald Nemec 07/20/2000 02:10 PM
